care_instructions: Hand wash warm.

name: Microfiber Quick-Dry Beach Poncho
description: Oversized poncho-style towel made from quick-drying microfiber. Ideal for changing or drying off at the beach/pool.
care_instructions: Machine wash warm, tumble dry low.

name: Raw Hem Denim Cut-Off Shorts
description: Classic five-pocket denim shorts cut high on the thigh with a frayed, raw hem. Mid-rise fit.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, expect hem fraying to increase.

name: Wool Blend Knit Skirt (A-Line)
description: Mid-weight wool blend knitted A-line skirt. Elasticated waist, hits below the knee. Warm and comfortable.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold, dry flat.

name: Heavyweight Corduroy Shirt
description: Thick, wide-wale corduroy shirt. Can be worn as an overshirt or buttoned up. Chest pockets with flaps.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, iron inside out.

name: Faux Fur Trapper Hat
description: Warm trapper hat with foldable ear flaps and a plush faux fur lining. Water-resistant outer shell.
care_instructions: Spot clean only.

name: Suede Desert Boots
description: Classic two-eyelet desert boots with a genuine suede upper and natural crepe rubber sole.
care_instructions: Use suede brush and protector spray.

name: High-Rise Cropped Sweater
description: Chunky knit sweater with a crew neck, designed to sit high on the waist (cropped). Balloon sleeves.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold, reshape and dry flat.

name: Silk Square Scarf (Large)
description: Large square scarf made from high-quality silk twill with a bold artistic print. Hand-rolled edges.
care_instructions: Dry clean only.

name: Lightweight Padded Gilet (Vest)
description: Thin, lightweight quilted gilet (vest) with light synthetic padding. Ideal as a mid-layer or light outerwear.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low.

name: Oversized Aviator Blue Light Glasses
description: Large, non-prescription aviator-style glasses with lenses that filter blue light from screens.
care_instructions: Clean with microfiber cloth.

name: High-Waisted Ponte Leggings
description: Thick, structured Ponte knit leggings that mimic the look of trousers. High-waisted with a wide waistband.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle.

name: Set of 4 Small Headbands (Knot)
description: Set of four thin headbands with a small decorative knot on top. Covered in various velvet and satin fabrics.
care_instructions: Spot clean only.

name: Fitness Crop Top (Seamless)
description: Seamless, fitted crop top with short sleeves and moisture-wicking technology. Designed to match high-waist leggings.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, air dry.

name: Tencel Lyocell Button-Down Shirt
description: Soft, draping long-sleeve shirt made from Tencel Lyocell, a sustainable fiber. Feels like silk, highly breathable.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Hang to dry.

name: Wide-Leg Palazzo Jeans
description: Extremely wide-leg, full-length jeans in a rigid denim. High-waisted for a modern silhouette.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, inside out.

name: Silver Initial Stud Earrings
description: Small, discreet stud earrings shaped like single initials. Sold as a pair of matching initials.
care_instructions: Clean with soft cloth.

name: Quilted Bomber Jacket (Satin)
description: Classic bomber jacket silhouette in a glossy, diamond-quilted satin. Ribbed collar and cuffs.
care_instructions: Dry clean recommended.

name: Wool Blend Felt Cap (Flat Cap)
description: Traditional flat cap (or ivy cap) made from a dense wool blend felt. Short brim, classic tailored look.
care_instructions: Spot clean only.

name: Waterproof Leather Hiking Boots (Ankle)
description: Ankle-height waterproof hiking boot with full leather construction and rugged Vibram sole.
care_instructions: Clean with leather wash and re-waterproof periodically.

name: Cropped V-Neck Sweater (Chunky)
description: Hand-knitted look, chunky sweater with a deep V-neck and dropped shoulder. Short, cropped body length.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold, dry flat.

name: Faux Suede Mini Dress (Shift)
description: Simple A-line shift mini dress made from soft faux suede. Sleeveless with a high round neck.
care_instructions: Dry clean recommended.

name: Slim Fit Trousers (Ankle Length)
description: Tailored slim-fit trousers that finish at the ankle (cropped). Smooth woven fabric with moderate stretch.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, hang to dry.

name: High-Waist Shaping Thong (Seamless)
description: High-waisted thong with seamless construction. Provides light to medium compression and shaping around the tummy and waist.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold.

name: Lightweight Running Jacket (Packable)
description: Ultra-lightweight windproof and water-resistant jacket that packs down into its own pocket. Ideal for trail running.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, line dry.

name: Cropped Short Sleeve Top (Ribbed)
description: Fitted, cropped short-sleeve top in a comfortable cotton rib knit. Crew neck.
care_instructions: Machine wash warm, hang to dry.

name: Tortoiseshell Square Readers (Magnifying)
description: Non-prescription reading glasses (magnifying) with square tortoiseshell frames. Available in various strengths.
care_instructions: Clean with lens cloth.

name: Woven Slip-On Mules (Faux Suede)
description: Pointed toe slip-on mules with a woven faux suede strap across the foot. Low stacked heel.
care_instructions: Spot clean with suede brush.

name: Leather Passport Holder
description: Genuine leather passport holder with slots for cards and boarding passes. Durable travel essential.
care_instructions: Wipe clean.

name: Oversized Denim Sherpa Jacket
description: Classic trucker jacket in denim, featuring a warm faux sherpa fleece lining in the body and collar. Oversized fit.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, avoid high heat drying.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings (Simple)
description: Simple, elegant drop earrings featuring a single faux pearl suspended from a thin gold-tone wire.
care_instructions: Wipe with a soft cloth.
